Dr. Kenji Sato

About the Provider

Precision-driven dermatology rooted in regenerative science

Dr. Kenji Sato is a physician-scientist with dual MD and PhD degrees and over sixteen years of experience in regenerative medicine, advanced skin science, and anti-aging technology. Her institute in Tokyo's Omotesando district combines the precision of Japanese medical practice with cutting-edge regenerative therapies that attract patients from around the world.

Dr. Tanaka's approach integrates scientific rigor with meticulous patient care. From autologous PRP protocols to proprietary stem cell-derived skin treatments, every therapy in her clinic is backed by published research and clinical validation. Her patients seek her out for her quiet confidence, technical mastery, and the uniquely Japanese attention to detail that defines every interaction.

What to Expect

Your first visit

1
Request a Consultation
Submit your inquiry through BeautyJar. The practice responds within 1–2 business days to schedule your appointment.
2
Comprehensive Assessment
Your first visit includes a full health and skin review, a discussion of your goals, and any relevant diagnostic work.
3
Personalized Treatment Plan
An individualized plan with clear explanations of options, expected outcomes, timelines, and transparent pricing.
4
Ongoing Care & Follow-Up
Follow-up visits ensure your treatment is progressing as expected. Adjustments are made collaboratively at every step.

Practice Policies

Cancellation Policy
24-hour advance notice required. Late cancellations may be subject to a fee.
Payment
Major credit cards accepted. Payment plans available for select programs.
Consultation Fee
Initial consultations require a deposit, applied toward treatment.
New Patients
Currently accepting new patients. Allow 48 hours for requests to be confirmed.
